opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I have these dark red bruises all over my shins that won't fade when I press on them, and I'm scared it's that deadly bacterial infection.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The spots came up on both my lower legs over the last half a day, and tonight I pressed on them and they didn't go pale, which really frightened me.

symptom_narrative.onset: over the last 12 hours or so
symptom_narrative.duration: about half a day and still there
symptom_narrative.character: dark red to purple spots and blotches, some slightly raised so I can just feel them, that don't go pale when I press on them
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: they don't really hurt, it's more that they look alarming and I'm anxious about what they mean
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: both shins and lower legs, fairly symmetric, nothing on my tummy, chest, arms or face
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: came on over the evening, roughly the same since
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: I don't feel hot or shivery, no fever that I can tell, no tummy pain, my wee looks normal, and my joints are fine — no aches or swelling.
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: never had anything like this before
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I'm managing normally at home, just worried

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: got over a mild cold / runny nose about two weeks ago; otherwise well and independent

objective_data_offered.value: dark reddish-purple spots and blotches on both shins that do not fade or go pale when I press on them with my finger
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: the patient's own description and finger-press test, not a clinician examination — pressure and lighting are uncontrolled

objective_data_offered.value: the spots are only on my lower legs and shins, on both sides, with none on my tummy, arms, chest or face
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: distribution as seen on a home phone camera; trunk and back not fully shown

objective_data_offered.value: some of the spots feel very slightly raised when I run my finger over them
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: self-reported palpation, not a clinician's assessment of whether the lesions are truly palpable
